sales_notes: Lead thought we were a consumer app. Angry when I mentioned enterprise pricing. Bad targeting.
Perfect fit. Loved the ROI dashboard feature. Ready to sign next week.
Wrong segment, looking for SMB tooling, not enterprise. Not worth following up.
Came from competitor X, ready to switch. Pricing aligned, contract review in progress.
Asked about consumer features, not enterprise. Confused about our product category.
Decision-maker on call, strong interest in attribution features. Deciding next month.
Budget too small, decision-maker not involved. Misaligned from the start.
Previously using a legacy tool, impressed by our CRM integration demo. High buy intent.
Looking for a free tool, pushed back on pricing immediately. Not enterprise-grade buyer.
Still evaluating, revisited pricing page twice. Needs more time before committing.
Revisited the site but ultimately went with a cheaper option. Not a fit at this price.
Warm lead, opened 3 follow-up emails. Scheduled a second demo call for next week.
Re-engaged briefly but team budget frozen until Q3. Unlikely to close this quarter.
Connected on LinkedIn, lukewarm interest. Has not responded to last two follow-ups.
Slow follow-up, initially interested but now unresponsive. May need a break in cadence.
Soft interest only, no clear use case articulated. Will revisit in 60 days.
Top-of-funnel only, no specific pain point surfaced yet. Early awareness stage.
Clicked through from a broad awareness ad, not a decision-maker, no follow-up needed.
No enterprise need, mentioned they run a small agency. Completely out of our ICP.
Strong referral from an existing customer. Motivated to switch before Q3 budget cycle.
